name: Aboitiz Equity Ventures, Inc.
summary: Aboitiz Equity Ventures, Inc., a conglomerate, engages in the power, banking and financial services, food, real estate, and infrastructure businesses in the Philippines. It is involved in the power generation, distribution, and retail of electricity supply; provision of banking and financial services; production of feeds and flour, hog and layer farm, and animal nutrition products; development of residential, commercial, and industrial communities, as well as development and operation of economic zones; and operation of airports. The company also offers water and wastewater-related services to residential, commercial, and industrial customers; digital infrastructure services; operates regional airports; operates integrated economic center projects; and manufactures and distributes cement. In addition, it provides aviation services; insurance products; and portfolio investment services. The company was formerly known as Cebu Pan Asian Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Aboitiz Equity Ventures, Inc. in December 1993. Aboitiz Equity Ventures, Inc. was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Taguig City, the Philippines.
